upgrades.name: Wooden Table
upgrades.description: The starting table. Can serve one customer.

upgrades.name: Metal Table
upgrades.description: Serves two customers simultaneously. Good early upgrade.

upgrades.name: Premium Table
upgrades.effect: Serves 3 customers at a time, +10% offer value
upgrades.description: Serves three customers and boosts offer values by 10%.

upgrades.name: Golden Table
upgrades.description: Top-tier table. Four customers with a 20% value boost.

upgrades.name: Quick Hands
upgrades.description: Cook meats 10% faster across all grills.

upgrades.name: Rapid Flip
upgrades.description: Stacks with Quick Hands for 20% total cook speed bonus.

upgrades.name: Blaze Cook
upgrades.description: Maximum cook speed upgrade. 35% faster cooking.

upgrades.name: Seasoned Chef
upgrades.description: Increases the timing window for perfect cooks.

upgrades.name: Master Chef
upgrades.description: Significantly widens the perfect cook timing window.

upgrades.name: BBQ Legend
upgrades.description: The best quality upgrade. Nearly guarantees perfect cooks with practice.

upgrades.name: Offline Storage
upgrades.description: Increases the maximum earnings you can accumulate while offline.

upgrades.name: Offline Efficiency
upgrades.description: Offline grills cook 25% faster while you're away.

upgrades.name: Auto Sell
upgrades.effect: Automatically sells cooked meats at best available offer
upgrades.description: Sells cooked meats automatically. Essential for AFK and offline play.

upgrades.name: Heavy Hitter
upgrades.description: Increases average meat weight, boosting sell value.

_disclaimer: All values are estimates based on community data. Actual in-game values may differ after updates.
